action.reasoning: Observation: I attempted to switch to a ResNet50 model to avoid the CLIP model issues, but encountered a network error because the model needs to be downloaded and the environment has no network access during training. This confirms that I need to use one of the pre-downloaded models mentioned in the task description. Since I've had persistent issues with CLIPVisionModel, I'll try using the pre-downloaded CLIP models properly. I'll modify the model to use these properly without causing the text component issues.
